headline: Truist Raises its Price Target on Agree Realty (ADC) to $82
summary: Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE:ADC) is one of the 10 High PE Stocks Insiders Are Buying. headline: How The Markel Group (MKL) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Buybacks
summary: Markel Group’s updated fair value estimate has shifted to about US$2,085 from about US$2,072, a modest move that still matters if you are tracking the story closely. Bullish and bearish analysts alike are using this change, along with the associated Neutral stance, to argue very different points about how much upside is already reflected in the new target. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might influence how you follow Markel Group over time. Analyst Price Targets...
